project: Wuxia Life Quality Gate Hardening V4
description: Harden the quality gate to eliminate false-green outcomes by combining exit-code checks with blocker-log scanning, warning classification, environment-noise cleanup strategy, and a repeatable stability gate before CI/release closure.

userStories.title: Block False-Green by Log-Aware Gate
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the real test gate to fail on blocker error logs so that runtime errors cannot pass as successful builds.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate policy includes blocker keywords: Failed to evaluate expression, ReferenceError, Unknown stat, localstorage-file invalid path
Policy defines failure behavior when any blocker keyword is detected
Validation contract remains compatible with existing real test suites

userStories.title: Define Error/Warning Classification Standard
userStories.description: As a team, I want a shared severity taxonomy for test output so that blocker issues are consistently prevented from merging.
acceptanceCriteria: Keyword dictionary is documented with examples
Boundary between blocker and warning is explicit

userStories.title: Eliminate Environment Warning Noise
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want environment initialization standards for local and CI so that noisy warnings do not hide real defects.
acceptanceCriteria: Plan defines valid localstorage path strategy for local and CI

userStories.title: Introduce Stability Gate Specification
userStories.description: As a team, I want a repeatable multi-run simulation gate so that non-deterministic failures are detected before release.
acceptanceCriteria: Stability gate defines batch-run count and pass/fail rules
Any blocker occurrence in batch run is specified as failure
Output requirements include reproducible failure evidence

userStories.title: CI and Release Contract Closure
userStories.description: As a release owner, I want CI/release checks aligned with hardened gate policy so that false-green regressions cannot ship.
acceptanceCriteria: CI required checks include typecheck, build, real gate, and stability gate
Release checklist includes zero blocker-log requirement
Team documentation reflects final merged policy
